title: I made a bot and bro 2% each day for the last 17 days..
author: Secret-Trick3622
selftext:
I’m not even sure how to explain this properly without sounding insane, but I think I’ve accidentally built something that genuinely changed the way I look at trading forever.

For context, I’m not some “never lost a trade” Twitter guru. I’ve been on the wrong side of this market more times than I’d like to admit.

So for the last few months I’ve been working on a crypto bot quietly in the background. Basically trying to build the trader I wish I was when emotions used to ruin me. Now it’s running… and that’s the weird part.

It doesn’t hesitate. It doesn’t get greedy after a win. It doesn’t tilt after a loss. It waits, strikes, manages risk, and moves on. Watching it work feels strange. 

I’m not saying it’s some magic infinite money machine, because that doesn’t exist. I’ve seen round 2% everyday for the last 17 days, some days would be 1 point something but 2% is great.

Yeah man I made tin with open claw, I always wanted to make something like it after trading for years, but here I am
